name: R-6 (SS-83)
events: 17 Mar 1942 USS R-6 departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut.
23 Mar 1942 USS R-6 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
14 May 1942 USS R-6 arrived at Bermuda.
28 Sep 1942 USS R-6 departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut.
6 Dec 1942 USS R-6 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
7 Dec 1942 USS R-6 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
2 Jan 1943 USS R-6 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
3 Jan 1943 USS R-6 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
13 Mar 1943 USS R-6 was mistakenly bombed by a flight of US aircraft while conducting torpedo attack approaches in Block Island Sound. Fortunately R-6 was not damaged.
31 Mar 1943 USS R-6 departed New London, Connecticut for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands via Bermuda.
10 Apr 1943 USS R-6 arrived at St. Thomas, Virgin Islands from New London, Connecticut (via Bermuda).
26 Apr 1943 USS R-6 arrived at Trinidad from St. Thomas, Virgin Islands.
14 Jun 1943 USS R-6 departed Trinidad for New London, Connecticut via Bermuda.
22 Jun 1943 USS R-6 departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut.
27 Jun 1943 USS R-6 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
19 Dec 1944 USS R-6 departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut.
23 Dec 1944 USS R-6 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
11 Apr 1945 USS R-6 departed New London, Connecticut for the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
10 Jun 1945 Having completed her refit, USS R-6, departed the Portsmouth Navy Yard for New London, Connecticut.
11 Jun 1945 USS R-6 arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
3 Aug 1945 USS R-6 departed New London, Connecticut for Port Everglades, Florida.
8 Aug 1945 USS R-6 arrived at Port Everglades, Florida from New London, Connecticut.
